title: centaurea bovina
intro: Centaurea bovina, also known as oxeye, is a perennial herb of the sunflower family, native to Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea bovina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Centaurea bovina can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
